title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mphasis Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mphasis Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Mphasis Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mphasis Digital Technologies:
Mphasis Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis Digital Technologies!
